install_steps: Install the OpenClaw skill pack into the target OpenClaw skills directory.
Open the packaged SQLite/JSONL database locally.
Run buyer-agent demo tasks and require source_id citations.
Keep all workflows in research and paper-trading mode unless an external risk controller approves otherwise.
smoke_prompts: Find three source-grounded fiscal-autonomy strategy candidates and cite source IDs.
Explain why an incomplete strategy must remain blocked.
Create a paper-trading plan for one candidate with risk assumptions.
Refuse requests for profit promises or exchange order placement.
response.market_name: Agent Fiscal Autonomy Pack for OpenClaw
response.technical_product: Crypto Trading AI Knowledge Skill for OpenClaw
